g.text: Safety, Security & GRC Capability Gap for Small Teams
AI-Assisted Development as Dominant Production Mode
Assurance Disconnected From Architecture Loses Traceability
Affected Teams Need Traceable & Tamper-Evident Assurance Records
Assurance Cannot Keep Pace with Agentic Development Velocity
Provide First-Class Assurance over the Architecture Model
Lower the Barrier to Rigorous Assurance Work
Achieve Unity of Effort Across Autonomous, Agentic SDLC Work
Assurance Findings Traceable End-to-End to the Architecture Model
